title: Service Localization Demo
description: A scenario-driven demo showing how an AI agent uses UModel to fetch telemetry and localize a bottleneck down a 4-layer request stack. A degraded checkout API is traced through service and datastore layers to a saturated connection pool, while infrastructure is ruled out.

scenario.title: Checkout API Latency Localized to a Datastore Connection Pool
scenario.symptom: checkout-api P99 breaches its 300ms SLO; the Checkout Flow journey shows a 2.1% error rate
scenario.critical_path: Checkout Flow → checkout-api → order-svc → orders-db → node-a
scenario.root_cause: orders-db (postgres) connection pool saturated (~98%); order-svc latency rises while its own CPU stays healthy
scenario.ruled_out: infrastructure nodes are healthy; sibling services (catalog, search, payment) are healthy
scenario.method: Walk the critical path top-down; at each hop fetch latency plus the hop's own resource health; attribute latency to the first hop whose downstream dependency is saturated while its own resources are fine.

seed_entities_note: display_name values for documentation; actual __entity_id__ values are 32-char MD5 hex of the semantic names below
